articles.title: WrestleMania simulcasts average 1.7 million viewers on ESPN, ESPN2 - Awful Announcing
articles.description: The two ESPN simulcasts of WrestleMania averaged 1.72 million viewers on ESPN and ESPN2 last weekend, not including ESPN Unlimited viewers.

articles.title: Michael Jackson's Nephew Slams Media Ahead of Biopic Release - Variety

articles.title: Madonna's Full List of Missing Coachella Clothes Revealed - TMZ
articles.description: Madonna’s been sounding the alarm over her missing wardrobe -- and TMZ’s now got the full list of what went missing ... including a lavender corset worth around $25K that she rocked during her epic performance with Sabrina Carpenter at Coachella last weekend.

articles.title: Boards Of Canada Detail New Album, ‘Inferno’ - The Quietus
articles.description: Boards Of Canada have shared details of a new album, titled Inferno. Spanning 18 tracks, it arrives 13 years on from the Scottish duo’s last LP, Tomorrow’s Harvest. You can watch a brief video teaser for the record below. Its announcement follows on from a re…

articles.title: Elizabeth Smart Is a Bodybuilder Now - The Cut
articles.description: Kidnapping survivor Elizabeth Smart revealed she’s now a bodybuilder after sharing a photo of herself at a bodybuilding competition — the fourth one she’s done.

articles.title: Hulk Hogan Consumed Enough Fentanyl to ‘Kill a Horse’ Following Divorce - Rolling Stone
articles.description: Hulk Hogan detailed his excessive fentanyl consumption in the final interview recorded prior to his death in July 2025 at the age of 71.

articles.title: Taylor Frankie Paul Chose Not to Resume Filming “Mormon Wives” Following Domestic Abuse Investigations (Exclusive Source) - Yahoo News UK
articles.description: PEOPLE previously confirmed that Taylor Frankie Paul and her ex-boyfriend, Dakota Mortensen, will not be initially involved when the Hulu series resumes production. A source now tells PEOPLE that Paul opted out of filming and has the option to return.
